creator: ibex@physik.TU-Berlin.DE
text:
Hi!

I put an updated port of mysql in
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/mysql-3.21.26-gamma-2.tar.gz

(Please DON'T use mysql-3.21.26-gamma.tar.gz. It has a wrong Makefile in it.)

Changes in detail:

- upgraded to mysql-3.21.26-gamma (of course)

- Added a german mirror

- Added --without-bench to CONFIGURE_ARGS, thus patches/patch-ad becomes
  obsolete and

- deleted patches/patch-ad

	Best regards Dirk
